oracle.body: if (!Array.isArray(nodeHeap) || !Array.isArray(valueHeap) || !Array.isArray(nextHeap) || !Array.isArray(prevHeap)) return { ref: -1 }; if (!thisRef || typeof thisRef !== 'object' || typeof thisRef.ref !== 'number') return { ref: -1 }; let idx = thisRef.ref; if (idx === -1) return { ref: -1 }; if (idx < -1 || idx >= nodeHeap.length) return { ref: -1 }; let steps = 0; const maxSteps = nodeHeap.length + 1; while (idx !== -1 && steps <= maxSteps) { if (idx < 0 || idx >= nodeHeap.length) return { ref: -1 }; const node = nodeHeap[idx]; if (!node || typeof node !== 'object' || !('object' in node)) return { ref: -1 }; const fields = node.object.fields; const valueRef = fields.value; const nextRef = fields.next; const prevRef = fields.prev; if (!valueRef || typeof valueRef !== 'object' || typeof valueRef.ref !== 'number') return { ref: -1 }; if (!nextRef || typeof nextRef !== 'object' || typeof nextRef.ref !== 'number') return { ref: -1 }; if (!prevRef || typeof prevRef !== 'object' || typeof prevRef.ref !== 'number') return { ref: -1 }; if (valueRef.ref < 0 || valueRef.ref >= valueHeap.length) return { ref: -1 }; if (nextRef.ref !== -1 && (nextRef.ref < 0 || nextRef.ref >= nextHeap.length)) return { ref: -1 }; if (prevRef.ref !== -1 && (prevRef.ref < 0 || prevRef.ref >= prevHeap.length)) return { ref: -1 }; if (nextRef.ref === -1) return prevRef; idx = nextRef.ref; steps += 1; } return { ref: -1 };
